prompt:
Scene:
A square concept-art turnaround sheet pinned against a soft neutral studio board, shown perfectly front-facing like a clean production document. The composition is bright, controlled, and diagrammatic rather than cinematic: pale gray paper field, restrained charcoal guide lines, soft overhead light, and enough margin for the sheet to breathe. The frame must feel like a polished animation or game studio deliverable with balanced spacing and clear silhouette readability.

Subject:
Design one original courier heroine presented in four aligned full-body views on the same sheet: front, three-quarter forty-five-degree view, ninety-degree side view, and back view. She stands in a relaxed T-pose with matching proportions in every view. Her identity is specific and repeatable: compact athletic build, copper-brown skin, narrow oval face, right-eyebrow notch scar, short dark bob tucked behind one ear, teal cropped jacket over a rust utility underlayer, matte graphite cargo trousers, split-tone knee boots, and a slim mechanical left forearm with amber indicator slits. Add a few small accessory insets such as gloves, belt buckle, and boot sole tread, but keep them secondary.

Important details:
The sheet must read as industrial character design, not poster art. Keep consistent anatomy, head size, limb length, clothing seams, hardware placement, and facial structure across all four views. Include a non-readable height ruler made only of ticks and blocks, a faint floor baseline, and thin callout boxes with abstract marks instead of text. Preserve clean negative space, controlled line hierarchy, and a professional concept-sheet rhythm.

Use case:
Character Turnaround series study 1/8, establishing the canonical identity and sheet grammar for a reference-driven production lineup.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no extra fifth pose, no dramatic action stance, no weapon, no floating UI overlay, no malformed hands, no inconsistent face between views.
title: Reference Courier Sheet
description: A canonical four-view turnaround sheet defining the courier's identity, proportions, and technical presentation.

generation.runner_notes: Root reference sheet for the courier identity, proportions, and turnaround layout.

en.title: Reference Courier Sheet

alt.en: A clean concept-art sheet showing the same courier in front, three-quarter, side, and back views.
alt.zh-CN: 一张干净的角色设定图，展示同一信使的正面、四分之三侧面、侧面和背面。
